info.name: Amazon Neptune Neptune Analytics API
info.description:
Neptune Analytics is a memory-optimized graph database engine for analytics, providing optimized graph analytic algorithms, low-latency queries, and vector search capabilities within graph traversals. This API provides management operations for Neptune Analytics graph resources including creating, managing, and querying graph databases optimized for analytical workloads.

Contact Support:
 Name: Amazon Web Services

item.name: graphs
{graphIdentifier}
reset
Amazon Neptune Reset a Neptune Analytics Graph

variable.description: (Required) The unique identifier of the graph to reset.

request.description: Empties the data from a Neptune Analytics graph, removing all nodes and edges while preserving the graph resource and its configuration.

header.description: Added as a part of security scheme: apikey
Added as a part of security scheme: apikey

variable.description: (Required) The unique identifier of the graph.

request.description: Returns detailed information about a specific Neptune Analytics graph resource.

header.description: Added as a part of security scheme: apikey
Added as a part of security scheme: apikey

item.name: Amazon Neptune Update a Neptune Analytics Graph

variable.description: (Required) The unique identifier of the graph.

request.description: Updates the configuration of an existing Neptune Analytics graph, such as provisioned memory or deletion protection settings.

header.description: Added as a part of security scheme: apikey
Added as a part of security scheme: apikey

item.name: Amazon Neptune Delete a Neptune Analytics Graph

query.description: (Required) Whether to skip creating a final snapshot before deletion.

variable.description: (Required) The unique identifier of the graph to delete.

request.description: Deletes a Neptune Analytics graph resource. The graph must not have deletion protection enabled.

item.name: Amazon Neptune Create a Neptune Analytics Graph

request.description: Creates a new Neptune Analytics graph resource. The graph is a memory-optimized database instance optimized for analytical workloads with support for openCypher queries and vector search.

header.description: Added as a part of security scheme: apikey
Added as a part of security scheme: apikey

response.name: A graph with the specified name already exists.

header.description: Added as a part of security scheme: apikey

item.name: Amazon Neptune List Neptune Analytics Graphs

query.description: Maximum number of results to return.
Pagination token from a previous request.

request.description: Returns a list of Neptune Analytics graph resources in the account.

header.description: Added as a part of security scheme: apikey

query.description: Maximum number of results to return.
Pagination token from a previous request.

item.name: snapshots
{snapshotIdentifier}

Amazon Neptune Restore a Graph from a Snapshot

variable.description: (Required) The identifier of the snapshot to restore from.

request.description: Creates a new Neptune Analytics graph by restoring from an existing snapshot.
